name: HR managers in small to medium-sized tech startups using BambooHR for onboarding tool
description: For HR managers in small to medium-sized tech startups processing 5–15 new hires/month, manual paperwork causes delays in new hire integration. We automate onboarding instead of manual processes.
target_audience: HR managers in small to medium-sized tech startups using BambooHR for onboarding
problem_solved: Inefficient onboarding process leading to delays in new hire integration.

locked_fields.primary_user: HR managers in small to medium-sized tech startups using BambooHR for onboarding
locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient onboarding process leading to delays in new hire integration.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For HR managers in small to medium-sized tech startups processing 5–15 new hires/month, manual paperwork causes delays in new hire integration. We automate onboarding instead of manual processes.
locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual onboarding processes with paper forms and email communication.

one_liner: For HR managers in small to medium-sized tech startups processing 5–15 new hires/month, manual paperwork causes delays in new hire integration. We automate onboarding instead of manual processes.
